results.title: Did Boston Blue Kill Off [Spoiler]? Is Baez Beantown-Bound In Season 2? EPs Weigh In On Finale Twists (And Blue Bloods Cameos)
results.description: The Blue Bloods spin-off ended Season 1 with one character cheating death... and another not looking so lucky. Plus, what does Baez's return mean for Season 2?
